name: kus-suite-extension
description: KUS Creator Suite — Extensión Chrome/Firefox para creadores

scripts.dev: echo 'Load src/ directly in Chrome developer mode'
scripts.zip:chrome: cd src && zip -r ../dist/kus-suite-chrome.zip . && echo 'Chrome package ready'
scripts.zip:firefox: cd src && zip -r ../dist/kus-suite-firefox.zip . && echo 'Firefox package ready'

author: EstacionKUS Medios
